member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.EventStoreActivityRestorer
member.summary: Restores the W3C TraceContext stored in event metadata so that downstream spans (projections, reactions) appear as children of the original write span.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.EventStoreActivityRestorer.RestoreFrom(JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.EventStoreMetadata,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new Activity linked to the trace that produced the event. Dispose the returned activity when processing is complete.
member.param: The event metadata containing the trace context.
The name of the operation for the new activity.
member.returns: A new Activity linked to the original trace, or a standalone Activity if.

member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.EventStoreMetadata
member.summary: Persisted as the KurrentDB event metadata blob. Combines business context (ExecutionContext) with the W3C TraceContext propagation fields needed by OpenTelemetry.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.CatchUp.KurrentDbAllStreamSubscription.BuildFallbackSystemContext
member.summary: Builds a fallback system execution context for events that lack metadata (e.g., seeds, migrations).

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.StreamNameMapper.ToStreamId(System.Type,System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: Generates a stream id in the canonical `{category}-{aggregateId}` format. It can be expanded to the `{module}_{streamType}-{tenantId}_{aggregateId}` format.
member.param: The stream type based on aggregate type.
